questions.question: Prove that the four colour problem is NP-complete. Explain the implications of this result on the study of graph colouring.
What is the chromatic polynomial of a graph with 5 vertices? Can you find a graph for which this polynomial is negative? Explain your answer.

Show that the five colour problem is NP-hard. Explain why the four colour problem is a special case of the five colour problem. How would you approach solving the five colour problem using the results from the four colour problem?
